# Digital Credit Yield

> Independent tracker for STRC and SATA — high-yield preferred stocks listed on Nasdaq. Live prices, dividend history, income projectors, and capital flow data. For information purposes only. Not financial advice.

## Main Pages

- [Home](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/): Overview of STRC and SATA with live prices and current yields.
- [STRC Hub](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/strc): Full hub for STRC (Stripe Capital Preferred Stock, 11.50% annualised yield).
- [SATA Hub](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/sata): Full hub for SATA (SoundHound AI Preferred Stock, 13.00% annualised yield).
- [Money Flow](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/money-flow): Weekly capital raised by STRC and SATA from SEC 8-K filings since each IPO.
- [Blog](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/blog): Articles on STRC, SATA, preferred stock investing, and dividend strategies.

## STRC Tools

- [STRC Live Chart](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/strc/chart): Live price chart for STRC.
- [STRC Dividend History](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/strc/dividends): Historical dividend payments for STRC.
- [STRC Growth Projector](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/strc/projector): Project income and portfolio growth from STRC dividends.
- [STRC Differentiator](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/strc/differentiator): Compare STRC against other income assets.

## SATA Tools

- [SATA Live Chart](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/sata/chart): Live price chart for SATA.
- [SATA Dividend History](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/sata/dividends): Historical dividend payments for SATA.
- [SATA Growth Projector](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/sata/projector): Project income and portfolio growth from SATA dividends.
- [SATA Differentiator](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/sata/differentiator): Compare SATA against other income assets.

- [How SATA Works](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/blog/how-sata-works)

- [STRC vs SATA](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/blog/strc-vs-sata)
- [How to Use the Growth Projector](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/blog/how-to-use-the-growth-projector)

## About

- [About](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/about): About Digital Credit Yield and its author, Robin Gillingham.
- [Contact](https://www.digitalcredityield.com/contact): Get in touch with questions about STRC, SATA, or dividend investing.
